page_metadata.biotools__summary: FHIR is a standard for health care data exchange. It is a platform specification that defines a set of capabilities use across the healthcare process, in all jurisdictions, and in lots of different contexts.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FHIR is a standard for health care data exchange. It is a platform specification that defines a set of capabilities use across the healthcare process, in all jurisdictions, and in lots of different contexts.
